ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "session_version" TEXT /* Version of the game being played in the session */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the session took place (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the device used for the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the player (e.g., IP address, geolocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the developer or studio */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players the game supports */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the player registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "preferred_games" TEXT /* List of the player's preferred games */,
  "last_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last session the player participated in */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings or rewards accumulated by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., knock, conditional knock) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the event (e.g., knock details) */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* In-game location where the event occurred */,
  "event_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the event */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the metrics were collected */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep within the session */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward earned at the timestep */,
  "avg_turns" REAL /* Average number of turns taken at the timestep */,
  "gin" INTEGER /* Gin value at the timestep */,
  "knock" INTEGER /* Number of knocks at the timestep */,
  "knock_possible" INTEGER /* Number of possible knocks at the timestep */,
  "cond_knock" INTEGER /* Number of conditional knocks at the timestep */,
  "total_turns" INTEGER /* Total number of turns taken in the session */,
  "max_turns" INTEGER /* Maximum number of turns taken in a single game */,
  "min_turns" INTEGER /* Minimum number of turns taken in a single game */,
  "game_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the game */,
  "player_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player at the end of the session */,
  "event_count" INTEGER /* Total number of events that occurred during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions played */,
  "total_play_time" TEXT /* Total play time across all sessions */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward earned across all sessions */,
  "most_played_game" TEXT /* Most played game */,
  "last_game_played" TEXT /* Last game played */,
  "total_achievements" INTEGER /* Total number of achievements earned by the player */,
  "total_sessions_per_game" TEXT /* Number of sessions played per game */,
  "total_play_time_per_game" TEXT /* Total play time for each game */,
  "average_session_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of sessions played by the player */,
  "best_game_score" INTEGER /* Best score achieved by the player in any game */,
  "worst_game_score" INTEGER /* Worst score achieved by the player in any game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed patch notes for the version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the version */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the game file for the version */,
  "minimum_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum system requirements for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_events" (
  "session_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., start, end, pause) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* In-game location where the session event occurred */,
  "event_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the session event */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of the achievement (e.g., milestone, challenge) */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_data" TEXT /* Additional data associated with the achievement */,
  "achievement_points" INTEGER /* Points or rewards associated with the achievement */,
  "achievement_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the achievement (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement */,
  "unlock_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required to unlock the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game setting */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_group" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., gameplay, graphics) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "user_overridden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting has been overridden by the user */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
